text: I feel like I am standing in the midst of recognition and creative achievement. The atmosphere in the first image is charged with anticipation, perhaps pride; so many people assembled, listening, reflecting on a shared accomplishment. In the second image, confronted with bold colors and research, I sense the optimism and the quiet satisfaction that follows dedicated work. Being here, I am buoyed by this collective pride—curious and alive, yet quietly introspective about how group effort and individual inspiration materialize into something worthy of admiration.
